gist.headline: Elevator maintenance
gist.blurb: A quick CSS tune-up for the Sirius Cybernetics Elevator Challenge to keep those Lottie animations looking sharp.
gist.summary: Fixed a CSS class name mismatch for Lottie animations in the Sirius Cybernetics Elevator Challenge community app.
gist.impact: Lottie animations in the elevator challenge app will now display correctly with the proper styling applied.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about fixing a CSS class name for a Lottie animation in an elevator app (Sirius Cybernetics Elevator Challenge). Visuals: The bee mascot wearing a tiny hard hat, fixing a glowing elevator panel or a CSS blueprint alongside the monitor robot.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny yellow hard hat, using a small wrench to fix a glowing retro elevator control panel. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holds up a blueprint showing CSS code with chunky retro sprites. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike. Text in pixel font: 'CSS FIXED'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
